name: Suspicious Cron Scheduled Task/Job
notes: This rule detects abuse of the cron utility to perform task scheduling for initial or recurring execution of malicious code.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Creation of Cron Files, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task/Job - Linux, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task
TD_list: APPLY Suspicious Cron Scheduled Task/Job on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:BehaviorDefinition: Creation of Cron Files, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task/Job - Linux, BB:BehaviorDefinition: Scheduled Cron Task
RED_list: Event name: Suspicious Cron Scheduled Task/Job
Event description: Detects abuse of the cron utility to perform task scheduling for initial or recurring execution of malicious code.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Machine Identifier (custom)
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
